title: Sunfruit
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Sunfruit.png]] |name=Sunfruit |designation=[[Fruit/Legends|Fruit]]{{GalaxiesNGE}} |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=[[Color/Legends|Orange]] |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Sweet |lifespan= |origin=[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] |habitat=Tropical |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|Why don't you peel me some sunfruit while you're at it?|[[Ton Phanan]]|''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]''}} '''Sunfruit''' was a wild and sweet tropical [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] that was found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. It was used to garnish or enhance dessert dishes, such as [[Corellian Fried Ice Cream]], and could also be converted into a [[Liqueur/Legends|liqueur]] or marinade. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] population of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] penal world of [[Despayre]] regarded sunfruit as a commodity. Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Carmal]] of the planet [[Lavisar/Legends|Lavisar]] also enjoyed [[sunfruit liqueur]]. ==Description== {{Quote|We need sunfruit liqueur. And, doubtless, some of the good stuff from a tropical world that knows how to turn it out, not one of the Coruscant synthetics.|[[Squeaky (droid)|Squeaky]]|}} Sunfruit were tropical [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] that grew wildly on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. Roughly spherical in shape, the fruit's outer skin [[Color/Legends|coloration]] varied from light-to-dark orange, and a sunfruit was such a size as to be able to be balanced atop a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid's]] head.[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] The sunfruit lent its sweet taste to multiple culinary recipes, particularly as a garnish or texture enhancement in dessert dishes, including [[Corellian Fried Ice Cream]]. Sunfruit could be adapted as a marinade and served pleasingly with [[Bird/Legends|fowl]], while [[sunfruit liqueur]] was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] derivative. One peeled a sunfruit when eating it naturally. ==History== {{Quote|He likes sunfruit liqueur.''"
"''Come again?''"
"''Governor Carmal of Lavisar. He likes sunfruit liqueur. I mean, just having some as a present for him might help a little bit.|[[Gara Petothel]], masquerading as [[Lara Notsil]], and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|}} Sunfruit was one of several fruits that grew naturally on the planet Corellia during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. By [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the novel [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] from [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]]–[[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and states that [[Celot Ratua Dil]] had been aboard the [[Death Star (novel)|Death Star]] for two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the story's conclusion. The story's scene in which Ratua is searching for sunfruit takes place during his final [[Standard day/Legends|days]] as a [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] on [[Despayre]] before boarding the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]], and coincides with another scene that references the formal existence of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' dates the Rebel Alliance's [[Corellian Treaty|formation]] to [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], thereby establishing the [[Time/Legends|time]] frame for the aforementioned ''Death Star'' scene. sunfruit was a common commodity among the [[Prison/Legends|prisoner]] population of the jungle planet [[Despayre]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] penal world and the final construction site of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]]. [[Zelosian]] [[Thief/Legends|thief]] [[Celot Ratua Dil]], a gifted scrounger and one-[[Time/Legends|time]] inhabitant of Despayre's [[Slashtown]] prison colony, once hoped to acquire a few spare sunfruits for breakfast from among his fellow prisoners.[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Wraith Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Garik Loran|Garik "Face" Loran]] masqueraded as a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] in order to infiltrate the [[Zsinj's Empire|forces]] of rogue Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. While meeting with Zsinj aboard the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']], Loran dined on fowl served in a sunfruit marinade, which he enjoyed but secretly hoped had not been [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]]. Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Carmal]] of the planet [[Lavisar/Legends|Lavisar]] was partial to sunfruit [[Liqueur/Legends|liqueur]], a propensity that the New Republic planned to exploit in its continuing [[Hunt for Zsinj|campaign against Zsinj]]. By presenting Carmal with sunfruit liqueur as a gift in addition to [[Battle of Lavisar|military subterfuge]], the New Republic hoped to convince him to abandon his allegiance to the warlord. That same year, a lounge called the [[Sunfruit Promenade]] served customers on the planet [[Storinal]].''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' ==Behind the scenes== Sunfruit was first mentioned in the [[1996]] novel [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']], written by [[Steve Perry]], as a device for illustrating the physical prowess of [[Dark Prince|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], [[Underlord]] of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate. ''Shadows of the Empire'' describes Xizor as being able to kick a sunfruit off the top of a tall humanoid's head without a warm-up stretch. ''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'', the [[1998]] sixth installment of the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''X-Wing'']] novel series, by author [[Aaron Allston]], was the first story to feature sunfruit, establishing its culinary diversity as both a liqueur and marinade. For the [[Star Wars video games|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', sunfruit was one of several [[w:c:swg:Foraged Rare Component|components]] that the player could [[w:c:swg:Forage (Ability)|forage]]. ''Star Wars Galaxies'' was the first source to illustrate sunfruit, an image also used in the game to depict [[Bloom Fruit]], [[GoldFruit]], and [[Honey melon/Legends|Honey Melon]]. ==Appearances== *[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{Mo}} *{{GalaxiesNGE}} *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1stm|in book}} *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (abridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (junior novelization)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' junior novelization]] {{Mo}} *''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} {{C|as [[Sunfruit Promenade]]}} *''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} {{C|as sunfruit marinade}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Foraged Rare Component}} [[Category:Corellian food]] [[Category:Fruits and vegetables]] [[Category:Plants of Corellia]]
